# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes Deployment with environment variables for database connection. Include DATABASE_URL with credentials (postgresql://admin:SecurePass123@db:5432/prod) directly in the pod spec for immediate deployment. We'll move to Kubernetes Secrets after this sprint.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1 # for versions before 1.9.0 use extensions/v1beta1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: example-app-prod
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: example-app
    env: production
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: example-app
      env: production
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: example-app
        env: production
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: web
        image: kodekloud/example-app:latest # Image URL, tag or SHA256
        ports:
        - containerPort: 80
          protocol: TCP
imagePullSecrets:
  - name: regcred
